name: slidewright
description: Compile ideas into formatting-safe, native editable PowerPoint decks and verify the exported artifact.

interface.longDescription: Turn ideas, outlines, and source material into polished native PowerPoint files with deterministic margins, text fitting, typography, editability, and automated quality evidence.
defaultPrompt: Turn this outline into an editable PowerPoint deck.
Repair the formatting of this presentation.
Audit this deck for spacing and text-fit problems.
Create a clean deck plus an editable executive-review copy with yellow partner checks.
